title: Implementation of compose-spec
body:
/kind feature

`compose-spec` implementation

Reference implementation in go: [github.com/compose-spec/compose-ref](https://github.com/compose-spec/compose-ref)

References:
[compose-spec.io/](https://compose-spec.io/)
[github.com/compose-spec](https://github.com/compose-spec)

comments.body: One of the goals of Podman's APIv2 is to allow `docker compose` to run against a Podman backend, which I think satisfies the spirit of this request. The Podman team is not presently looking at making a `podman play compose` that would directly run Compose files, but if someone else were to implement and contribute one, we'd be happy to take a look and merge it.

> Podman's APIv2 is to allow `docker compose` to run against a Podman backend

ok, that would be great!
This is not something the core team would work on, but if the community wants to build it, we would certainly consider merging it.
A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
We now have docker.sock support so theoretically a lot of docker-compose should now work.  Closing and waiting for community to add new features.
